next_action: Apply one bounded live runner timeout/concurrency/stability and task-registry freshness repair, keep the codex exec suite sequential, and rerun deterministic validation before expanding the suite or adding dashboard/API commands.
overclaim_boundary: A green live shape report does not prove repair quality or productivity lift. Dirty positive live deltas with failed tasks remain no_lift_evidence, and the three-task suite is below the lift gate.
rationale: Goal 025 proved dirty positive live evidence must stay no_lift_evidence when only 1/3 tasks complete. Goal 006 now requires a bounded runner timeout/concurrency/stability and stale task-guidance repair before prompt tuning, suite expansion, dashboard commands, or productivity claims.
